results.title: Ever wondered why so many South Indians have curly hair? Science has answer
results.description: Have you ever wondered why many South Indians naturally have curly hair? Discover the scientific reasons behind this unique trait, including genetics, climate, evolution, and hair biology, while separating myths from facts in this easy-to-understand guide.

results.title: Ali Fazal recalls being 'scared' to say 'yes to Mirzapur, calls the film 'national level experiment'
results.description: Ali Fazal has opened up about the uncertainty he faced before signing Mirzapur, revealing why he initially hesitated to join the hit series. The actor also shared his excitement about Mirzapur: The Movie, calling it a first-of-its-kind experiment in India.

results.title: Trovato morto in canonica: un malore stronca Don Gianni Masin
results.description: Finestre chiuse e due ventilatori accessi: il sacerdote di Beolo aveva 85 anni. Era anche collaboratore delle parrocchie di Conselve e Palù

results.title: Muse Wow Us Into Submission With Their 10th Album
results.description: The Wow! Signal, the U.K. neo-prog band's latest, is a predictably heavy lift The post Muse Wow Us Into Submission With Their 10th Album appeared first on Rolling Stone India .
